title: rudgea sclerocalyx
intro: Rudgea sclerocalyx is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the yellow leaf tree. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Traditionally, Rudgea sclerocalyx has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
